<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="RandCellSkin" width="200" height="200" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" >
	<w:Config id="15e57a6e93f" ></w:Config>
	<e:Group left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0">
		<e:Image id="img_bg" source="ba6_s1_png" x="0" y="0" width="200" height="200"/>
		<e:Image id="img_goods" source="bingfu_png" horizontalCenter="-1" verticalCenter="-5" touchEnabled="false"/>
		<e:Label id="label_name" text="Label" y="159" horizontalCenter="0" stroke="3" touchEnabled="false"/>
		<e:Image id="img_mask" source="ui_mask_png" left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0" touchEnabled="false"/>
	</e:Group>
</e:Skin>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<e:Skin class="RandLayerSkin" width="750" height="1206" xmlns:e="http://ns.egret.com/eui" xmlns:w="http://ns.egret.com/wing" >
	<w:Config id="15e579e37ea" ></w:Config>
	<e:Group left="0" right="0" top="0" bottom="0">
		<e:DataGroup id="group_goods" width="696.97" height="969.7" x="24.52" y="163.42" anchorOffsetX="0" anchorOffsetY="0"/>
		<e:Button id="btn_start" label="start" x="295.01" y="50">
			<e:skinName>
				<e:Skin states="up,down,disabled">
				<e:Image width="100%" height="100%" source="btn27_s1_png" source.down="btn27_s0_png" source.disabled="btn27_s0_png"/>
				<e:Label id="labelDisplay" horizontalCenter="0" verticalCenter="0"/>
				</e:Skin>
			</e:skinName>
		</e:Button>
	</e:Group>
</e:Skin>
